chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Cr. Misc. Appln No.S-48 of 2025. _______________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of MA No.836/2025 (S/A). 03-03-2025 Mr. Nazir Ahmed Bhangwar, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State a/w SIP-Ali Dost on behalf of SSP, Kamber- Shahdadkot and SIP- Roshan Ali Chandio, PS Kamber City. -------- The applicant has invoked inherent jurisdiction of this court against order dated 13-02-2025, passed by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-II/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Kamber, whereby an application under section 22-A&B Cr.P.C for according directions to SHO concerned to record statement of applicant in pursuance of section 154 Cr.P.C is allowed. Today, applicant and his learned counsel are called absent without intimation. Statement has been furnished by the Incharge SHO PS Kamber, stating therein that in pursuance of the order referred hereinabove, passed by the learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, a case bearing crime No.63/2025 offence u/s 506/2, 148, 149 PPC PS Kamber has already been registered. He has placed on the record copy of the FIR. Instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application is, therefore, dismissed being in-fructuous. JUDGE
